title: lathyrus nissolia subsp. pubescens
intro: Lathyrus nissolia subsp. pubescens, also known as the pubescent pea or hairy pea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
